query_normalized: assessing the reliability of statistical power calculations in real-world datasets statistics
rationale: The paper focuses on measuring instructors' attitudes toward teaching statistics (a social/educational construct), whereas the user's question concerns the reliability of statistical power calculations (a methodological/statistical property). This is a case of distinct constructs sharing only the keyword "statistics," failing to meet any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it does not address the mechanism, variables, or empirical setting of power calculation reliability.
